title: Khao Khua Pilaf
description: A spicy and flavorful khao khua pilaf dish with a kick of Egyptian spices.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Fry and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Khao Khua and cook for 2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the Rice and Pilaf, stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff with a fork and serve hot.
